reviews.review_description: The first time I used this app there was probably 60 videos, now a few months later there's less than a dozen and then a bunch of previews and 2 movies that I have to pay for. What happened?
I'm not sure if they lost licensing rights to a lot of their content but there is hardly anything to watch. I wouldn't bother downloading it.

Guys... Its only been a few weeks, what happened to all the Ateez and Oneus performances?! 

Nooo pls bring them back or at least reupload on YT!!! 😭
Where is it?
Why did you delete the Ateez performances? Would’ve given it 5 stars if you still had Ateez on there. Super disappointing. Please bring Ateez back!
Amazing video quality. Unfortunately there appears to be a lack of new content.
Its almost 3 years they dont add nothing, dead platform
Hey anyone at VENTA X, why is it whenever I’m not active on the app, the app will log me out and I have to resign back in?! Please add more K-pop groups or singers! Other than that I enjoy the app!
The black screen is gone… but no new groups for months.  I love K-pop thanks to this app.

I absolutely love this app. But for the last couple of days, I’ve only been able to get a black screen. I use this app almost every day and I really miss it. Can you please figure out what’s wrong with it and fix it ASAP?
Best VR App

Venta X used to work fine. Now…it doesn’t. Feel free to download it if you like looking at a blank, black screen. I don’t know about you, but there seems to be no way to get past their black, BLANK screen. This app is terribly broken. Do not download. However, you can do what I did to fix this situation by deleting Venta X (which no longer works anyway), and downloading the DEOVR app. DEOVR works great with a thousand times MORE content than when Venta X used to work. I don’t know, but I think the misguided morons that developed this worthless app, are planning on charging for it. That’s why they’ve cut everybody off without ANY warning or explanation. What else could it be??? Regardless - do yourself a huge favor and get rid of Venta X and get DEOVR instead. DEOVR works. Plus they have a huge K-pop library.

I’m not sure if it’s just on Quest 2, but this app has a serious Memory availability issue! I can only watch one performance, and then not again unless I restart the app. It takes about 2 minutes to start up. It’s not a network issue, as this also occurs on VRChat. These performances are insane and I love watching them. I just wish it wasn’t so difficult to do so.

So for some reason this app forces you to make an account with these guys before you can buy any of the concerts. Not a big fan of those kinds of practices tbh. Just let me use my Oculus account instead of trying to force yet another account down my throat. Companies are getting hacked all over the place these days so the less accounts I have, the better.

reviews.review_title: When it works it is awesome
reviews.review_description: When it actually works it is an awesome app. But most of the time it doesn’t work, launches into a black screen. Also it needs some new content.

reviews.review_title: I came for Dreamcatcher and stayed for..
reviews.review_description:
I grabbed the 3S on release day and immediately downloaded this app, as I’ve been wanting to see the Dreamcatcher: Curse of the Spider video. I’m a big fan of theirs and the experience is even more surreal after seeing them in concert and meeting the girls in real life. 
But the other content makes this app a must have for any KPop fan. The upscaled videos are great to watch even though you can see a bit of distortion. When the girls are further from the camera sometimes you can see a sort of “milk mustache” but it’s not too distracting.
The selection of artists are a good mix of Boy and Girl groups. I’m not into the boy groups myself, but if you are they have plenty to choose from.
I don’t understand why all the groups aren’t putting out a vids for all their songs like this.

To the Creators of the app. My only trouble is recently the 8k vids are beginning to load slowly and keep stuttering on me.
If I switch the video to 4K, everything works fine. However, I want to look into their eyes in 8k. What would you suggest to fix this?

reviews.review_title: Show me more G-IDLE and take my money!
reviews.review_description: Btw, the function of video downloading or buffering is necessary!

Update: from the Feb. 20, 2025 "Dive drop" the 4k - 8k upscales are very good! (No more headaches) especially Solar-"Spit it Out"
You just earned yourself another Star!! 🌟

                     My Original review: 

I really love the quality of the 8k videos and almost all my favorite female KPOP artists, but you need to bring more 8k videos because most of the upscale 4k - 8k videos start to give me a headache.  Other than that a fantastic experience!

developer_response.body:
Hello, Lexina.
Thank you for your valuable feedback!
We're so glad you're enjoying the 8K video content on VENTA X, and we truly appreciate your positive feedback on the quality.
We understand that the upscale from 4K to 8K can be uncomfortable, and we will strive to provide even better content in the future.
We’ll continue to improve in order to offer an even better experience! Thank you for your support! 💜

reviews.review_title: I would GLADLY pay for a premium version
reviews.review_description:
This app is amazing! Especially the "It's Live" section. It's like the idols are singing to you personally.

The only issue is the lack of artist. I assume getting the rights to broadcast more artist is expensive which is why I (and likely others) would be willing to pay for a premium version. 

Thank you so much for this app!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind feedback and compliments. 😊
We’re thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the “It’s Live” content. It was created with the goal of delivering an experience that feels like the idols are performing right in front of you, and we hope that feeling came through.
We also understand your feedback about the variety of artists. Rest assured, we’re working hard to provide more diverse content. Additionally, we truly value your suggestion regarding a premium version and will carefully consider it.
We’ll continue striving to deliver even better services. Thank you once again! 🙏

reviews.review_title: It got better with the update

It's still a problem for those who don't have good internet, but it's a big step forward, because now I can at least watch it. I hope you continue posting more K-pop performances. I'm enjoying watching the groups' performances in VR, getting to know new groups and seeing groups I already knew again. I hope there are more and more new videos.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your valuable feedback, Lucas Cardozo!
We’re glad to hear that the update, which now supports 4K videos, has improved your experience.😆
While we understand that internet issues can still be a challenge, we hope that you can now enjoy the videos more easily. We’ll continue to work on providing more K-pop performances and introducing new groups to enjoy. We look forward to bringing you even more exciting content and hope you continue to enjoy the VR experience. Thank you for your continued support!

reviews.review_description:
For starters, I have to say that the app is well designed and easy to use in general.

After going into the hall for the Dreamcatcher concert, I got quite excited for the concert itself since we're able to freely move around the space, which led me to believe that it would be the same during the concert, but, unfortunately, that wasn't the case. Our POV is fixed throughout with a 180° viewing option. With that said, while it was a bit disappointing on that part at first, the POV is really well placed during the entirety of the concert so I quickly forgot about my disappointment. Plus, it was clearly done for artistic purposes since some effects wouldn't have had as much impact if you weren't in the intended spot.

For the concert itself, Dreamcatcher was excellent as usual and the opportunity to see them this up close was the highlight for me along with being able to see the choreo so clearly. For the in-between parts though, I could have done without some of them haha (along with the very last part of You and I) since I'm really not into visual horror. But while I'm not a fan of horror, these sequences were still really well done and fit with the concepts introduced by Dreamcatcher in the past, mainly during the Nightmare series and BEcause.

In the end, I highly recommend the app and am looking forward to the making of coming out the 15th and for what Venta X will bring next even if it doesn't involve Dreamcatcher, though I am really hoping that they'll do some more things with them in the future!

reviews.review_description:
Venta X Application:
- Controls: It might be due to this being my first time using a Meta VR headset, but at first the controls felt very unintuitive. For example, I’m someone who usually games on consoles, and for me the most logical/intuitive way to select something would be to use the A/B button rather than the shoulder triggers on the back - especially because selecting options within Meta’s menu also uses the A/B button too. So for the longest time (like 2-3 days lol), I wasn’t able to do anything in the app thinking that it was broken/not up to date yet. HOWEVER, once I figured that out, it was smooth sailing overall.

- Download: After the whole episode with the controls, I was excited to download the concert. However, I wasn’t able to download the videos at first? I made sure my headset was set to go to sleep only after 4 hours per instruction and I would return to my headset with the download bar reaching 100%, but the videos just would not work and I had to click download over and over again. I think at one point I got so frustrated that I almost gave up, but I’m glad that it worked out at the end because the concert was super fun!

~=~=~=~=~

Concert ! :
Super fun and exciting! At first I got kind of nervous because the members are so close lol, but after getting used to the distance it was super fun to watch! In real life you would never get to be this up close with any performing artist, so it was exhilarating to be able to see the members’ every little move and expression in such great detail. 

One slight down side to this viewing though is how limiting the viewing/camera angles were. Overall the camera angle was set to the center where the currently-singing-member would be and it worked for the most part, however, there were times where a member’s part would come up but their position was to the side and when you turn to look at them they seem kind of squished(?), so that’s something to think about/look out for with future concerts especially how dynamic k-pop choreographies are! I found myself enjoying the performance even more when the camera was moving along with the performance - like when they pulled the camera back and forth in BEcause, I think that really made me ~feel~ the magic of VR. Nevertheless, I’m very excited to see how this technology would evolve and improve for future acts!

~=~=~=~=~

Notes To Others(?):
If you get sick watching 3D stuff, I found that if you leave the player/toggles on screen, the concert would flatten the video/lose its 3D effects. But of course that would lessen the VR magic since it’ll be blocking the (bottom of the) screen and the show loses its immersion, but better than feeling sick/dizzy I supposed? But, plus side is that the girls would look extra large on screen lol.

reviews.review_title: THE app to go for VR K-POP content
reviews.review_description:
Yes I said it, and I mean it! I downloaded it for Dreamcatcher's concert. I never knew any artists having a full VR concert so I had to check it out. As someone who was used to the youtube vr stages, my mind was blown away. 8K really made all the difference! I can really feel they are so up close to me in their real life sizes, and their faces are so clear I can't believe it. I really really wish more artists can be featured here!
A small recommendation is that maybe let the thumbstick be a shortcut to turn back or forward a few seconds! I love to rewatch certain parts of the stage, but I always need to click 3 times every time I do that.

developer_response.body:
Hello Jamie!!!
Thank you so much for using VENTA X and leaving such a positive review!
It has been a great source of motivation for our content production team.💜🥹

Regarding Jamie's suggestion for the player's Thumbstick feature, we are currently working on improvements and development.
We understand it might be inconvenient, but we kindly ask for your patience as we work to make it better.🙏

Once again, thank you for the wonderful review!💜💜

reviews.review_title: Best (and worst) 30 minutes of my life
reviews.review_description:
Best: It was my first time watching a VR concert, and it was absolutely mindblowing and overwhelming (in a good way). It felt like I was given the front row seat and Dreamcatcher was performing right in front of me, I almost panicked when the first song, Maison, started. 

Worst: However, as someone who is not a fan of clowns, I'd have appreciated a trigger warning stating them upfront. It will be really helpful for those who have phobias to be informed and/or have the chance to skip the cutscenes - whether or not it might compromise the viewing experience. 

In relation to the tech aspect, it might be because it was my first time using Quest 2, I had difficulty getting Venta X to start working for the first time - intuitively I had spammed the A button thinking that would work, but it wasn't the case. 

Thank you for this 6th anniversary gift! Overall, it was an amazing experience and I would love to watch more of such VR concerts, be it starring Dreamcatcher again (please) or other talented artistes!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for leaving a good evaluation for our concert!

Thank you for telling me about the phobia skip part!
I'll try to improve it in the next content!😉

VENTAX's 3D VR MUSIC CINEMA that's as vivid and vivid as a movie!
Please continue to show a lot of interest.

reviews.review_description:
As a person that has only gone to 2 live concerts ever and have loved it (1 being Dreamcatcher's) I can say with all conviction that you can't compare this experience with regular online concerts or even live concerts! This is a total different experience and point of view, it's something you can't get even with VIP at venues.

I really hope Venta X collabs with Dreamcatcher again in the future and they keep having these concerts along with live and online concerts, all three formats have their perks and I would get all three, but this absolutely takes the cake for me. 

It feels like the directors and producers really did put a lot of research and dedication on capturing Dreamcatchers Nightmare Concept, it's feels so good to be taken back to those days, made me feel part of that time even if I was still not a fan back then! Made me feel like they were promoting this era again ^^

Sometimes the transitions between takes are a little trippy but I think it adds to the atmosphere on this particular story of dreams and nightmares.

If there's something to do about it for next time I would also suggest a little bit more of interactivity while waiting for the videos to download or being able to see one while the other downloads, not sure if that is possible.

I personally didn't get dizzy at all with the camera changes even though I don't use the VR headset as much.

Overall it was a greatly directed story with great performers, great music and a totally unique experience!  Now all the people that I know that have not experienced a VR concert yet will hear me preaching them non-stop until they do, it's just so insanely cool!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for leaving a good evaluation for our concert!

Thank you for telling me what I need!
I'll try to improve it in the next content!
Please look forward to it!

VENTAX's 3D VR MUSIC CINEMA that's as vivid and vivid as a movie!
Please continue to show a lot of interest.

reviews.review_description:
I had never experienced anything like this. I did not think VR had come this far as I often see goofy low resolution videos on SNS related to it and always thought there is still a very long way to go before you truly get to immerse yourself in another "VR" world.

After seeing the highlight trailer and Korean Insomnias talking about how amazing it was on twitter I finally gave in and bought the Meta Quest 2 for this and I am so glad I did it. Amazing work all around from Venta X team and Dreamcatcher (as always, is that ever even in question!? 😤)

I think having the audience right on stage with Dreamcatcher was a genius idea. This way I was not distracted by some of the limitations which I guess are due to the current state of the VR technology itself and not because of any lack of effort by the Venta X team. 

Something like the black void in the back, it did not hinder my experience at all. I only noticed it because it took me a while to figure out that the VR music cinema was playing behind me. I was always facing the opposite direction when I tried to play it, hope its fixed or changed if it was intentional. Maybe people who have been using VR for a while might notice it and get distracted intially but I think once the performance starts hope they will be fine.

The 🕷️and 🤡 were a great touch and even though the animation looked a little dated I didn't mind, it was good enough for this experience. I can only imagine when the technology advances and such things start to get more immersive and realistic, and how crazier this can get in the future. 

All in all I would say great effort by everyone I was honestly mind blown especially seeing them up close like this. I am very excited to see what else can be done on VR similar to this and looking forward to such Dreamcatcher concerts in the future on Venta X. Awesome collaboration 🫶🏽

VENTAX's 3D VR MUSIC CINEMA that's as vivid and vivid as a movie!

reviews.review_description: I have just paid for what appears to be nothing  whne in the concert hall amazing - but click on to view concert nothing happens - when click on making ofs  starts to download - when go back in when appears read says file corrupt re download but will not let me - feel ripped off paid money for nothing deeply disapointed as one of the reasons bouth a headset and then purchase this for nothing and when try and get on website to contact a twitter banner is in way and can not get rid to use the coontact button behind sad that my beloved Dreamcatcher can not be viewed via what was touted as an exciting experience and I can not see and lost my money

developer_response.body:
Hi. Sorry for the inconvenience first. 
Except for 3D SAMPLE VR, our content is a system where you download and watch the concert PART1,2/3D MAKING VR. (I couldn't help but watch it in high definition.) 
However, when the internet environment is not good, the internet connection is disconnected without you knowing and the file is damaged. 
The file looks like it's been received, so if you press the play button, it says it's a damaged file. 
In that case, press the minus button on the top right of the play button to delete it and download it again from a place with good internet connection. 
If there is a problem again, please send an email to staff@ventavr.com.
